title: Why Your Spending Habits Hold You Back

segments.text: Your spending habits are costing you more than you think.
This mistake keeps you from building real wealth.
Many don’t realize they spend on status, not value.
Are you buying things to impress others?
That's a trap that keeps you broke, not rich.
Ready to reshape your relationship with money? Follow for tips.

description: Your spending habits might be your biggest barrier to wealth. Follow to change the way you see money. 💸
